title: Context types and NORN.md file loader
purpose: Establish the context module's type system and file loading infrastructure. This brief creates the context/ folder module, defines the ContextFile type, and implements discovery and loading of always-on NORN.md files from user-level (~/.norn/NORN.md) and project-root ({cwd}/NORN.md). The loaded content is concatenated and prepared for injection into the base system instruction.
task: Create context/mod.rs, context/types.rs, and context/loader.rs. The loader reads both always-on context file locations, records initial mtime for staleness detection, and returns concatenated content. User-level content comes first, project-root second (project has higher effective precedence). The loader produces content suitable for appending to system_sections[0].

requirements.title: Context module structure
requirements.spec: context/mod.rs SHALL contain only pub mod declarations and pub use re-exports. It SHALL NOT contain functions, structs, traits, or enums.
acceptance: crates/norn/src/context/mod.rs exists
mod.rs has pub mod types, pub mod loader
crates/norn/src/lib.rs declares pub mod context

requirements.title: ContextFile type
requirements.spec: context/types.rs SHALL define a ContextFile struct with path (PathBuf), content (String), and mtime (Option<SystemTime>) fields.
acceptance: ContextFile has path: PathBuf field
ContextFile has content: String field
ContextFile has mtime: Option<std::time::SystemTime> field
ContextFile derives Clone and Debug

requirements.title: User-level NORN.md loading
requirements.spec: WHEN ~/.norn/NORN.md exists, the loader SHALL read its content and record its mtime. WHEN it does not exist, the loader SHALL skip it without error.
acceptance: With ~/.norn/NORN.md present, loader returns a ContextFile with content and mtime
With ~/.norn/NORN.md absent, loader returns no user-level context file
Path resolution uses norn::config::paths::norn_dir() from NC-001

requirements.title: Project-root NORN.md loading
requirements.spec: WHEN {cwd}/NORN.md exists, the loader SHALL read its content and record its mtime. WHEN it does not exist, the loader SHALL skip it without error.
acceptance: With {cwd}/NORN.md present, loader returns a ContextFile with content and mtime
With {cwd}/NORN.md absent, loader returns no project-root context file
The cwd path is provided as a parameter, not hardcoded

requirements.title: Content concatenation with user-first ordering
requirements.spec: The loader SHALL concatenate loaded context files with user-level first, then project-root. The two sections SHALL be separated by a double newline.
acceptance: With both files present, user-level content appears before project-root content
The two sections are separated by '\n\n'
With only project-root present, only project-root content is returned
With neither present, empty string is returned

requirements.title: Base instruction injection point
requirements.spec: The concatenated context content SHALL be appended to system_sections[0] after profile instructions and before the skill catalog listing. The loader SHALL provide a method that returns the formatted content string ready for appending.
acceptance: Loader provides a method returning the formatted context string
The returned string is suitable for direct concatenation into system_sections[0]
When no context files exist, the method returns an empty string (appending nothing)

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement mtime staleness detection — that is NX-002
SHALL NOT implement nested NORN.md detection — that is NX-005
SHALL NOT implement rule file discovery — that is NX-003
SHALL NOT wire into build_runtime — that is NX-006
verification: cargo test -p norn -- context passes all new tests
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
context/mod.rs contains only pub mod and pub use — no logic
